name: Flyto2 Warroom CE Demo
description: Evidence-first demo workspace covering code, container, cloud, external attack surface, evidence, and AutoFix workflows.

surfaces.title: Code security
surfaces.ce_path: SAST, SCA, secrets, IaC, reachability, code score, and deterministic remediation evidence.
surfaces.enterprise_path: AI proposals, approval bundles, promotion, rollback, and managed merge evidence.

surfaces.title: Container security
surfaces.ce_path: Image and Dockerfile posture are source-labeled as repo definition or local container evidence.
surfaces.enterprise_path: Live registry/workload remediation and managed connector execution.

surfaces.title: Cloud posture
surfaces.ce_path: Cloud connector contracts, posture views, IAM evidence, and local findings when configured.
surfaces.enterprise_path: Live cloud remediation, commercial enrichment, and signed managed actions.

surfaces.title: External attack surface
surfaces.ce_path: Footprint, asset map, ownership, posture, false-positive handling, and verification loop.
surfaces.enterprise_path: Commercial threat intelligence, continuous monitoring, and managed validation.

surfaces.title: Evidence graph
surfaces.ce_path: Timeline, evidence pack, replay result, audit trail, and signed artifact contract examples.
surfaces.enterprise_path: Legal hold, airgap evidence bundles, support attestations, and customer-specific retention.

surfaces.title: AutoFix loop
surfaces.ce_path: Deterministic fix rules, gated preview, operator acceptance, and verification evidence.
surfaces.enterprise_path: AI proposal gate, approval workflow, live cloud/container/runtime remediation, rollback evidence.

evidence_pack.claim: Dependency finding is reachable through the demo API route.
Container issue is tied to Dockerfile/package definition, not a live cluster.
Cloud remediation is gated unless a connector, role, and entitlement are present.
External exposure can be marked verified fixed, reopened, or false positive with evidence.
AutoFix requires preview, gate decision, operator acceptance, and post-fix verification.

not_claimed: CE does not claim guaranteed coverage.
CE does not claim 100% AutoFix success.
CE does not claim full replacement of Aikido or any scanner.
claimed: CE shows the open-core evidence loop locally.
Premium actions attach through capability, entitlement, connector, and signed evidence contracts.
False positives and verification results are part of the workflow, not hidden from the user.
